sacco

Class Canvas

  • java.lang.Object
    • sacco.Canvas

  • public class Canvas
extends java.lang.Object

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      Canvas(java.awt.Graphics tmpG)
      Constructor to be used internally.
      Canvas(java.awt.Graphics2D tmpG)
      Constructor to be used internally.

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void drawAngledLine(int x, int y, double degrees, double length)
      Draws a line starting at a given point and continuing in a given direction for a given length
      void drawArc(int x, int y, int width, int height, int startAngle, int endAngle)
      Draws a section of the oval defined by x, y, width, and height.
      void drawLine(int x1, int y1, int x2, int y2)
      Draws a line between the two given coordinates
      void drawOutlinedString(java.lang.String str, int x, int y) 
      void drawOval(int x, int y, int width, int height)
      Draws the outline of an oval bounded by the rectangle created by the given location, with the given width and height
      void drawPicture(Picture img, int x, int y)
      Draws the given Picture object at its natural size
      void drawPicture(Picture img, int x, int y, int width, int height)
      Draws the given Picture object at the given x and y, with a given width and height
      void drawPoint(int x, int y)
      Draws a single Pixel at a given location.
      void drawPolygon(Polygon p)
      Draws the outline of a polygon based on the given Polygon object
      void drawRectangle(int x, int y, int width, int height)
      Draws the outline of a rectangle with the given x,y, width, and height
      void drawRectangle(java.awt.Rectangle rect)
      Draws the outline of the Rectangle object passed in as a parameter
      void drawString(java.lang.String str, int x, int y)
      Draws the given String with a lower left corner at x and y
      void drawTriangle(Point a, Point b, Point c)
      Draws the triangle defined by the three endpoints given
      void fillOval(int x, int y, int width, int height)
      Draws a filled oval bounded by the rectangle created by the given location, with the given width and height
      void fillPolygon(Polygon p)
      Paints a filled in polygon based on the given Polygon object
      void fillRectangle(int x, int y, int width, int height)
      Draws a filled rectangle with the given x,y, width, and height
      void fillTriangle(Point a, Point b, Point c)
      Fills the triangle defined by the three endpoints given
      java.awt.Color getColor() 
      Font getFont() 
      int getFontSize()
      Returns the current size of the font
      java.awt.Graphics getGraphics() 
      int getStringAscent()
      Returns the current String Ascent, meaning the distance from the baseline to the top of the tallest character
      int getStringDescent()
      Returns the current String Descent, meaning the distance from the baseline to the bottom of the lowest hanging character
      int getStringWidth(java.lang.String str)
      returns the number of pixels wide the parameter String will be with the current font size
      int getThickness()
      Returns the current thickness of the Canvas
      boolean isBold()
      Returns true if the Canvas's font is currently bold
      static void main(java.lang.String[] args) 
      static void printFontList()
      Prints every available font to the terminal
      void resetRotation()
      resets the rotation of the Canvas back to zero
      void rotateAroundPoint(double degrees, double x, double y)
      Rotates the Canvas around the given x and y coordinate
      void setBold(boolean b)
      modifies the font to be Bold or not
      void setClip(java.awt.Shape clip)
      Sets the clipping area of the Canvas.
      void setColor(java.awt.Color color)
      Sets the color of the Canvas to the given Color object
      void setColor(int red, int green, int blue)
      Sets the color of the Canvas to the given red, green, and blue values
      boolean setColor(java.lang.String col)
      Sets the color of the Canvas to one of the standard presets
      void setFont(Font f)
      sets the Canvas's font to the given Font object
      void setFont(java.lang.String fontName)
      Sets the Font to a given Font.
      void setFontSize(int size)
      Sets the Font to a given size
      void setItalic(boolean b)
      modifies the font to be Italic or not
      void setThickness(int thickness)
      Sets the thickness of the line to the parameter

    • Constructor Detail

      • Canvas

        public Canvas(java.awt.Graphics2D tmpG)
        Constructor to be used internally. You will never construct your own Canvas
        Parameters:
        tmpG - Not your problem

      • Canvas

        public Canvas(java.awt.Graphics tmpG)
        Constructor to be used internally. You will never construct your own Canvas
        Parameters:
        tmpG - Not your problem

    • Method Detail

      • drawRectangle

        public void drawRectangle(int x,
                 int y,
                 int width,
                 int height)
        Draws the outline of a rectangle with the given x,y, width, and height
        Parameters:
        x - the x coordinate of the upper-left corner
        y - the y coordinate of the upper-left corner
        width - the width of the rectangle
        height - the height of the rectangle

      • drawRectangle

        public void drawRectangle(java.awt.Rectangle rect)
        Draws the outline of the Rectangle object passed in as a parameter
        Parameters:
        rect - The Rectangle to draw

      • fillRectangle

        public void fillRectangle(int x,
                 int y,
                 int width,
                 int height)
        Draws a filled rectangle with the given x,y, width, and height
        Parameters:
        x - the x coordinate of the upper-left corner
        y - the y coordinate of the upper-left corner
        width - the width of the rectangle
        height - the height of the rectangle

      • fillPolygon

        public void fillPolygon(Polygon p)
        Paints a filled in polygon based on the given Polygon object
        Parameters:
        p - The polygon to be painted

      • drawPolygon

        public void drawPolygon(Polygon p)
        Draws the outline of a polygon based on the given Polygon object
        Parameters:
        p - The polygon to be painted

      • setColor

        public void setColor(int red,
            int green,
            int blue)
        Sets the color of the Canvas to the given red, green, and blue values
        Parameters:
        red - the new color's red level
        green - the new color's green level
        blue - the new color's blue level

      • setColor

        public boolean setColor(java.lang.String col)
        Sets the color of the Canvas to one of the standard presets
        Parameters:
        col - One of the following: “red”,”black”,”white”,”blue” ,”green” ,”orange” ,”pink” ,or ”yellow”
        Returns:
        true if the parameter color matches one of the predetermined value.

      • getColor

        public java.awt.Color getColor()

      • setColor

        public void setColor(java.awt.Color color)
        Sets the color of the Canvas to the given Color object
        Parameters:
        color - the Color object representing the desired color

      • rotateAroundPoint

        public void rotateAroundPoint(double degrees,
                     double x,
                     double y)
        Rotates the Canvas around the given x and y coordinate
        Parameters:
        degrees - the number of degrees to set the rotation to
        x - the x coordinate to rotate around
        y - the y coordinate to rotate around

      • drawLine

        public void drawLine(int x1,
            int y1,
            int x2,
            int y2)
        Draws a line between the two given coordinates
        Parameters:
        x1 - the x coordinate of the first point
        y1 - the y coordinate of the first point
        x2 - the x coordinate of the second point
        y2 - the y coordinate of the second point

      • drawAngledLine

        public void drawAngledLine(int x,
                  int y,
                  double degrees,
                  double length)
        Draws a line starting at a given point and continuing in a given direction for a given length
        Parameters:
        x - the x coordinate of the starting point
        y - the y coordinate of the starting point
        degrees - the angle the line will be oriented
        length - the length of the line

      • setClip

        public void setClip(java.awt.Shape clip)
        Sets the clipping area of the Canvas.
        Parameters:
        clip -

      • setThickness

        public void setThickness(int thickness)
        Sets the thickness of the line to the parameter
        Parameters:
        thickness - how many pixels thick the line will be when drawing

      • getThickness

        public int getThickness()
        Returns the current thickness of the Canvas
        Returns:
        the current thickness of the Canvas

      • getFontSize

        public int getFontSize()
        Returns the current size of the font
        Returns:
        the current size of the font

      • drawOval

        public void drawOval(int x,
            int y,
            int width,
            int height)
        Draws the outline of an oval bounded by the rectangle created by the given location, with the given width and height
        Parameters:
        x - - the x coordinate of the bounding rectangle
        y - - the y coordinate of the bounding rectangle
        width - - the width of the bounding rectangle
        height - - the height of the bounding rectangle

      • fillOval

        public void fillOval(int x,
            int y,
            int width,
            int height)
        Draws a filled oval bounded by the rectangle created by the given location, with the given width and height
        Parameters:
        x - - the x coordinate of the bounding rectangle
        y - - the y coordinate of the bounding rectangle
        width - - the width of the bounding rectangle
        height - - the height of the bounding rectangle

      • drawArc

        public void drawArc(int x,
           int y,
           int width,
           int height,
           int startAngle,
           int endAngle)
        Draws a section of the oval defined by x, y, width, and height. The arc starting and ending are in degrees
        Parameters:
        x - - the x coordinate of the bounding rectangle
        y - - the y coordinate of the bounding rectangle
        width - - the width of the bounding rectangle
        height - - the height of the bounding rectangle
        startAngle - - the angle where the arc starts
        endAngle - - the angle where the arc ends

      • setFontSize

        public void setFontSize(int size)
        Sets the Font to a given size
        Parameters:
        size - - the Font size in pts

      • getGraphics

        public java.awt.Graphics getGraphics()

      • setFont

        public void setFont(Font f)
        sets the Canvas's font to the given Font object
        Parameters:
        f -

      • getFont

        public Font getFont()

      • setFont

        public void setFont(java.lang.String fontName)
        Sets the Font to a given Font.
        Parameters:
        fontName - - a String that represents the Font. A list of available fonts is printed by calling the static method printFontList()

      • printFontList

        public static void printFontList()
        Prints every available font to the terminal

      • setBold

        public void setBold(boolean b)
        modifies the font to be Bold or not
        Parameters:
        b - - true will set the font to Bold, false will "un-Bold"

      • isBold

        public boolean isBold()
        Returns true if the Canvas's font is currently bold
        Returns:
        true if the Canvas's font is currently bold

      • setItalic

        public void setItalic(boolean b)
        modifies the font to be Italic or not
        Parameters:
        b - - true will set the font to Italic, false will "un-Italic"

      • resetRotation

        public void resetRotation()
        resets the rotation of the Canvas back to zero

      • drawString

        public void drawString(java.lang.String str,
              int x,
              int y)
        Draws the given String with a lower left corner at x and y
        Parameters:
        str - - the String to be drawn
        x - - the x coordinate of where the first letter starts
        y - - the y coordinate of where the baseline is

      • drawOutlinedString

        public void drawOutlinedString(java.lang.String str,
                      int x,
                      int y)

      • getStringWidth

        public int getStringWidth(java.lang.String str)
        returns the number of pixels wide the parameter String will be with the current font size
        Parameters:
        str - - The String to be tested
        Returns:
        The length of the String with the current font

      • getStringAscent

        public int getStringAscent()
        Returns the current String Ascent, meaning the distance from the baseline to the top of the tallest character
        Returns:
        - the distance from the baseline to the top of the tallest character

      • getStringDescent

        public int getStringDescent()
        Returns the current String Descent, meaning the distance from the baseline to the bottom of the lowest hanging character
        Returns:
        - the distance from the baseline to the bottom of the lowest hanging character

      • drawPicture

        public void drawPicture(Picture img,
               int x,
               int y,
               int width,
               int height)
        Draws the given Picture object at the given x and y, with a given width and height
        Parameters:
        img - - The Picture object that contains the image to be displayed
        x - - the x coordinate of the upper-left corner
        y - - the y coordinate of the upper-left corner
        width - - the width of the Picture
        height - - the height of the Picture

      • drawPicture

        public void drawPicture(Picture img,
               int x,
               int y)
        Draws the given Picture object at its natural size
        Parameters:
        img - - The Picture object that contains the image to be displayed
        x - - the x coordinate of the upper-left corner
        y - - the y coordinate of the upper-left corner

        public void drawPoint(int x,
             int y)
        Draws a single Pixel at a given location.
        Parameters:
        x - - the x coordinate of the location
        y - - the y coordinate of the location
